case_title: CITY & CO OF SF VS. JOSE J QUEZADA
cause_of_action: SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT REGARDING PARENTAL OBLIGATIONS

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES CALENDAR FOR MOTION BY CCSF TO JOSE J. QUEZADA RE: JUDGMENT SUPPORT/HEALTH CARE ON JAN-17-2002 - GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER (416) GENERAL ADVISEMENT GIVEN RE COMMISSIONER ACTING AS JUDGE PRO TEM; MOTHER PRESENT, FATHER PRESENT IN PRO PER BY TELEPHONE CONFERENCE, CSA=SAPORITO; BASED ON FATHER'S ANSWER FILED WITH THE COURT ON 7/3/01 FATHER ADMITS PATERNITY FOR THE CHILDREN DOBS 1/8/96 AND 11/23/98 THEREFORE COURT MAKES A FINDING OF PARENTAGE FOR THE CHILDREN IN QUESTION; COURT ORDERS THAT FATHER PAY BELOW GUIDELINE CHILD SUPPORT $191.00.($100.00 FOR YOUNGER CHILD + $91.00 FOR OLDER CHILD) + $9.00 FOR CHILD CARE = $200.00 PER MONTH BY WAGE ASSIGNMENT COMMENCING 2/1/02; GUIDELINE =$229.00; FATHER TO PROVIDE THE TELEPHONE NUMBER TO PRIOR EMPLOYER GENESIS TO DCSS WITHIN THE NEXT 30 DAYS; FOR THE TIME PERIOD 6/1/01 THROUGH 7/31/01 CHILD SUPPORT = $266.00($166.00 FOR YOUNGER CHILD + $100.00 FOR OLDER CHILD) + $43.00 CHILD CARE = $309.00PER MONTH; COMMENCING 8/1/01 THROUGH 1/31/02 THE COURT DEEMS THIS PERIOD AS ARREARS; TOTAL ARREARS FROM 6/1/01 THROUGH 1/31/02 = $1,818.00; ADMINISTRATIVE LIQUIDATION OF ARREARS; FATHER'S EARNINGS APPEAR TO BE BELOW STANDARD MINIMUM WAGE; STANDARD HEALTH INSURANCE ORDER; BOTH PARTIES TO PROVIDE HEALTH INSURANCE IF AVAILABLE AT NO OR LOW COST PER MONTH; FATHER TO NOTIFY DCSS WITHIN 10 DAYS OF ANY CHANGE OF EMPLOYMENT/RESIDENCE/INCOME OR HEALTH INSURANCE. (WIGHTMAN)PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LEWIS GILLIAN CSR #12355; CLERK: FRANCES BRENES
